---
title: "Pricing"
draft: true
---

# Pricing

::: {.section-intro}
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
:::

::: {.pricing-grid}

::: {.price-card}
### Introductory Call
<div class="price-value">$00</div>

- 15–20 minutes
- Placeholder format
- Placeholder note
:::

::: {.price-card}
### Standard Session
<div class="price-value">$160</div>

- 50 minutes
- Placeholder delivery mode
- Placeholder payment note
:::

::: {.price-card}
### Extended Session
<div class="price-value">$220</div>

- 80 minutes
- Placeholder delivery mode
- Placeholder payment note
:::

:::

## Payment and cancellation

::: {.split-two}

::: {.panel-soft}
### Payment

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer posuere erat a ante.
:::

::: {.panel-soft}
### Cancellation policy

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer posuere erat a ante.
:::

:::

::: {.cta-band}
## Questions about fees?

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.

[Ask a question](/contact.html){.btn-cp-primary}
:::
